title: ፱፩፪ Eclipsed Dread ፱፩፱ Dark Fantasy | Horror
description: New realistic entities, weapons and more
body:
**𝔈ℭ𝔏ℑ𝔓𝔖𝔈𝔇 𝔇ℜ𝔈𝔄𝔇**

Dive into the haunting depths of "Eclipsed Dread," a dark fantasy horror mod for Minecraft that transforms your blocky world into a nightmarish realm filled with terrifying entities and cinematic quality 3D weaponry. 

As the sun sets and the fog rolls in, be wary of the new, realistic creatures that stalk the shadows, each one more horrifying than the last. From the relentless Wraiths that haunt your dreams to the ghastly Flesh Golems forged from the remnants of the fallen, these entities are designed to create a truly immersive and chilling experience. Prepare yourself for jump scares and spine-tingling encounters as you delve deeper into the dark corners of this mod.

Equip yourself with historically-correct, intricately designed 3D weapons that are not only visually stunning but also characteristic of the dark fantasy genre. From cursed swords that whisper of their previous victims to wicked crossbows that fire cursed bolts, you’ll have the tools you need to defend yourself—if you dare to face the horrors lurking within.

Prepare for an adventure that will challenge your nerve, resourcefulness, and combat skills. "Eclipsed Dread" awaits—are you ready to embrace the fear? 💀⚔️🌑

Mod adds 12 high quality medieval melee weapons, 4 groups of undead entities, every of them is one of decomposition stages and a boss.

Mod does not require any lib or api so it probably be compatible with most other modification, shaders
